# Momentum guides problem thinking

## Short Teaching Summary
Momentum guides problem thinking: The momentum equation serves as a 'guide to thinking' and not merely a 'plug-and-chug recipe for algebraic problem-solving.'. Map connection: this idea links by analogy_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
